impact: This advances the PP&D plan by validating that agents ask only for missing reversible request fields grounded in process requirements, without introducing browser-action automation or private DevHub artifacts.
summary: Add a fixture-only missing-information schema test derived from the committed PP&D process fixture.
target_task: Task checkbox-46: Task checkbox-41: Add a fixture-only missing-information schema test that derives missing user facts from the committed process fixture. Validate only reversible request fields, not browser actions.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
